title: Malaysian-Style Chicken Satay
description: Grilled chicken skewers served with a spicy peanut sauce, inspired by the flavors of Malaysia. A delicious and easy-to-make dish perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together coconut milk, peanut butter, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, lemongrass, and chili flakes.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve hot with peanut sauce for dipping.
To make the peanut sauce, combine peanut butter, soy sauce, and brown sugar in a blender or food processor.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
